title: RAGdeterm: Deterministic retrieval-augmented generation for code generation
summary: This paper introduces RAGdeterm, a deterministic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) approach for code generation. Instead of using vector embeddings and similarity search, RAGdeterm enriches prompts with a relational database that explicitly models object-oriented code structures and dependencies. This design ensures deterministic and repeatable retrieval of project-specific contextual information, avoiding probabilistic mechanisms. The system is presented as an alternative to traditional, enhanced, and agentic RAG architectures in software engineering, where predictability and reproducibility are important.
author: A. Bochenek, J. Protasiewicz, W. Pedrycz
